channel.title: Community on PrestaShop Developers' blog
channel.description: Recent content in Community on PrestaShop Developers' blog

item.title: PS Summit 2026 in Lyon - Registrations, Call for Papers and Workshops
item.description: We are excited to announce that the first-ever PS Summit powered by PrestaShop & Sylius is officially taking shape! This November, our communities will meet in Lyon, France, to bring together the open source ecommerce community and the wider ecosystem. Registrations are now open, our Call for Papers is ready for your proposals, and we have an exclusive cross-community workshop planned just before the main event.

item.title: OW2con’26 — two days of open source conversations with PrestaShop
item.description: OW2con’26 has just wrapped up, and PrestaShop was proud to take part in two packed days (June 2–3) at Orange Innovation Gardens in Paris–Châtillon. As OW2’s annual European open source conference, OW2con delivered what it does best: practical discussions, a welcoming community, and high-quality conversations.

item.title: PS Summit 2026 - Call for Papers now open (Lyon)
item.description: This November, the PrestaShop and Sylius communities will meet in Lyon, France for the first-ever PS Summit powered by PrestaShop & Sylius: a two-day conference designed to bring together the open source ecommerce community and the wider ecosystem.

item.title: PrestaShop Live Update - March 2026
item.description: On March 31st, 2026, we hosted the first PrestaShop Project Live Update of 2026. This was a special edition: Mikołaj Król (CEO), Damian Murawski (COO), and Olivier Binet (General Manager) joined us for the first time together since PrestaShop’s acquisition. The trio said hi, answered community questions, and shared their perspective on the project’s direction. We also covered the latest releases and gave an in-depth look at the upcoming One Page Checkout feature.

item.title: Ecommerce Open Source Summit 2026 - a wrap-up
item.description: The inaugural Ecommerce Open Source Summit (EO2S) wrapped up after a packed day of conferences, technical deep dives, and networking. Held on March 26, 2026 at Le Nida in Issy-les-Moulineaux, the event brought together developers, agencies, and ecommerce professionals united by a shared commitment to open source ecommerce.

item.title: Announcing PrestaShop Project Live Update March 2026
item.description: The first PrestaShop Project Live Update of 2026 will take place on Tuesday, March 31st, 2026 at 3 PM (Paris time) on YouTube!

item.title: AI-Powered API Hackathon: 14+ Endpoints in a Single Day
item.description: On March 12th, developers from across PrestaShop’s tech teams joined forces for a hackathon, splitting into four teams with one clear mission: accelerate the development of the Admin API.

item.title: Join us at the inaugural Ecommerce Open Source Summit (EO2S) in Paris
item.description: On March 26, 2026, the inaugural Ecommerce Open Source Summit (EO2S) takes over Le Nida in Issy-les-Moulineaux for a full day of conferences, technical deep dives, and networking — all dedicated to open source ecommerce.

item.title: PrestaShop 2025: Year in Review
item.description: As 2025 comes to a close, it’s time to reflect on an incredible year for the PrestaShop project. From the highly anticipated release of PrestaShop 9 to the vibrant gatherings at FOP Days and the Developer Conference, this year has been defined by innovation, collaboration, and the unwavering dedication of our community.

item.title: From Good Intentions to Measurable Impact: PrestaShop's Call for Contributions at Open Source Experience
item.description: This month of December, Paule Morizot and Fabien Moreau of PrestaShop spoke at Open Source Experience about the project’s Call for Contributions. What a great place to give an update on this topic and to show an experienced crowd what we are currently doing at PrestaShop.

item.title: Call for contributions: Admin API - great start!
item.description: Two months ago, we launched our second Call for Contributions initiative, this time focusing on the Admin API. We’re excited to share the progress that’s been made!

item.title: PrestaShop Developer Conference 2025: Register now!
item.description: The ecommerce world is advancing at an exciting pace, creating fresh opportunities for developers and businesses. That’s why we are excited to announce the third edition of the PrestaShop Developer Conference, taking place on November 19, 2025, in Paris and, for the first time, online.

item.title: Meet the PrestaShop Wall of Fame
item.description: From its very first release, PrestaShop has been built and improved thanks to the dedication of its open source community. Today, we’re introducing a new way to celebrate that dedication - directly in your back office.

item.title: Call for contributions: Admin API
item.description: After the success of our first Call for Contributions focused on hooks, it’s time to launch a new round. This time, we’re inviting the community to contribute to one of the most significant changes in PrestaShop 9: the new Admin API.

item.title: PrestaShop Live Update - July 2025
item.description: On July 30th, 2025, we hosted another Live Update for the PrestaShop Project, highlighting the announcement of the upcoming One Page Checkout (OPC) feature in PrestaShop 9.1. We also covered the current state of the project, recent releases, and ongoing contribution initiatives, including the Admin API.
